Package org.eventb.core.tests.sc

Class BasicSCTest

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.core.tests.BuilderTest
org.eventb.core.tests.EventBTest
org.eventb.core.tests.sc.BasicSCTest
Direct Known Subclasses:
BasicSCTestWithFwdConfig
public abstract class BasicSCTest extends EventBTest
Abstract class for builder tests.
